goal: forall(x0: Complex) { lib(complex_abs).complex_modulus(x0) = Real.0 implies x0 = Complex.0 }
proof: let w0: Complex satisfy { lib(complex_abs).complex_modulus(w0) = Real.0 and Complex.0 != w0 }
let w0: Complex satisfy { lib(complex_abs).complex_modulus(-w0) != lib(complex_abs).complex_modulus(w0) }

goal: forall(x0: Complex, x1: Complex) { lib(complex_abs).complex_modulus(x0 + x1) <= lib(complex_abs).complex_modulus(x0) + lib(complex_abs).complex_modulus(x1) }
proof: let w0: Complex satisfy { exists(k0: Complex) { not lib(complex_abs).complex_modulus(w0 + k0) <= lib(complex_abs).complex_modulus(w0) + lib(complex_abs).complex_modulus(k0) } }
let w1: Complex satisfy { not lib(complex_abs).complex_modulus(w0 + w1) <= lib(complex_abs).complex_modulus(w0) + lib(complex_abs).complex_modulus(w1) }
let w2: Complex satisfy { not lib(complex_abs).complex_modulus(w0 + w2) <= lib(complex_abs).complex_modulus(w0) + lib(complex_abs).complex_modulus(w2) }
function(x0: Complex, x1: Complex) { lib(complex_abs).complex_modulus(x0 + x1) <= lib(complex_abs).complex_modulus(x0) + lib(complex_abs).complex_modulus(x1) }(w0, w2)

goal: forall(x0: Complex, x1: Complex) { (x0 * x1).norm = x0.norm * x1.norm }
proof: let w0: Complex satisfy { exists(k0: Complex) { (w0 * k0).norm != w0.norm * k0.norm } }
let w1: Complex satisfy { (w0 * w1).norm != w0.norm * w1.norm }
let w2: Complex satisfy { (w0 * w2).norm != w0.norm * w2.norm }
function(x0: Complex, x1: Complex) { x0.norm * x1.norm = (x0 * x1).norm }(w0, w2)
